survey.title: Image Quality Evaluation Survey
survey.subtitle: Help us evaluate the quality of generated images
survey.instructions: Please rate each image based on the following criteria:
survey.mainInstruction: TASK: Please read the image caption and rate the images below. You could read the Article or Article summary to get more context about the caption and the image
survey.finalizationInstructions: TASK: Review your top-rated images and select your overall best image for this article.
survey.languageWarningMessage: Original language of the article is English. We encourage you to complete the survey in English, if possible, for accurate understanding of the Article.
survey.translatedArticleBanner: This is an AI translated article
survey.feedbackQuestion: Would you like to see how many pictures of the source guess you did is correct?
survey.pointsEarned: You earned {{points}} point{{plural}} from this article!

relevance.label: Relevance
relevance.description: How relevant is this image to the article topic? Does it appropriately represent the subject matter?

real_like.label: Real-likeness
real_like.description: How realistic does this image appear? Does it look authentic and natural, without obvious artifacts?

accuracy.label: Accuracy
accuracy.description: How accurately does this image represent the article content? Are the details semantically correct?

source_guess.label: Source Guess
source_guess.description: Based on all aspects of the image, do you think it is real or AI-generated?

demographics.title: Tell us about yourself
demographics.subtitle: This information helps us understand your perspective (completely anonymous)
demographics.occupation: What is your primary area of occupation?
demographics.aiStance: Your current stance on AI development:

buttons.nextTooltip: Please evaluate all the cards completely!

consent.title: Cookie Consent
consent.message: Help us improve our research - we'd like to remember you if you return to continue the survey. Your session will be stored in a cookie.

notifications.demographicsError: Error saving your information. Please try again.
notifications.demographicsSaved: Thank you! Your information has been saved.
notifications.ratingError: Error saving rating. Please try again.
notifications.completeAllRatings: Please rate all criteria before continuing
notifications.surveyComplete: Survey complete! Thank you for your participation.

errors.loadingFailed: Failed to load survey. Please refresh the page.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

leave.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave the survey?
leave.thankYouMessage: Thank you for taking the time to help with our research. Your feedback has been recorded and is valuable to us!
leave.thankYouDetails: Your responses have been successfully saved and will contribute to improving our research.
leave.footerText: You can now close this browser tab.
